fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user ID of a warehouse employee. Each user who performs warehouse activities must be set up as a warehouse employee and assigned to at least one location.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location in which the employee works.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the location code that is defined as the default location for this employee's activities.

fields.name: ADCS User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ADCS user name of a warehouse employee.
